summary: Tested 3 inbox thread UX improvements. Backend APIs work correctly. Feature 1 (Clickable contact name) PASS. Feature 5 (Card type picker with returnToThread) PASS. Feature 2 (Relationship Intel bar) has critical web interactivity bug - bar renders but clicks don't trigger onPress.

ui_bugs.issue: TouchableOpacity for Intel bar is not clickable on web - no role='button', no tabindex, no cursor:pointer. Click events don't trigger the onPress handler.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Wrap the Intel bar TouchableOpacity in a web-compatible button element similar to WebToolButton pattern at line 46-88, or add role='button', tabIndex={0}, style={{cursor:'pointer'}} to make it interactive on web

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Relationship Intel bar TouchableOpacity to be clickable on web - add web-compatible click handling (either wrap in HTML button element for IS_WEB or add role='button' + tabIndex + cursor:pointer)
LOW: Add proper data-testid propagation to TouchableOpacity elements for easier testing
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: Line 2707 had syntax error }}} (triple closing braces) - fixed to }} (double closing braces)
BUG FIXED: Line 622 - generateIntel() was calling /contact-intel/${user._id}/${id}/generate but backend endpoint is POST /{user_id}/{contact_id} (no /generate suffix) - fixed
ISSUE: Intel bar TouchableOpacity (line 1772) renders as non-interactive div on web - needs web-specific click handling like WebToolButton pattern (lines 46-88)
PASS: Contact name clickable (line 1657) - navigates to /contact/{id}
PASS: Card type picker (line 2705) - correctly includes returnToThread param in URL
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend contact-intel API works (13/13 pytest tests pass). Two syntax bugs in thread/[id].tsx were fixed. Remaining issue: Intel bar TouchableOpacity on line 1772 needs web-compatible click handling - currently not responding to clicks on web platform.

feature_1_clickable_contact_name.verification: Clicked 'API Test' in header → navigated to /contact/69a1354f2c0649ac6fb7f3f1
feature_1_clickable_contact_name.data_testid: thread-contact-name-link (exists in code but not rendered on web due to TouchableOpacity issue)

feature_2_relationship_intel_bar.issue: Intel bar TouchableOpacity renders correctly (sparkle icon + 'Relationship Intel' text + chevron visible) but clicks don't trigger onPress handler on web
feature_2_relationship_intel_bar.root_cause: TouchableOpacity renders as non-interactive div without role='button' or cursor:pointer on web
feature_2_relationship_intel_bar.backend_api: PASS - GET /api/contact-intel and POST /api/contact-intel endpoints work correctly (verified via pytest)
feature_2_relationship_intel_bar.data_testid: thread-intel-bar, thread-intel-content, thread-intel-refresh (in code but not accessible due to click issue)

feature_3_auto_return_from_card_creation.reason: Requires photo upload to create card which is complex in automation

feature_5_card_type_picker_returnToThrea.verification: Clicked Attach Photo → Create Card → Congrats Card → URL included returnToThread=69a1354f2c0649ac6fb7f3f1

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Wrong API endpoint - calling /generate suffix that doesn't exist
